name: Franklin Ethereum Trust
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Franklin Ethereum Trust (the Trust) was formed as a Delaware statutory trust on February 8, 2024, and is governed by the provisions of an Amended and Restated Agreement and Declaration of Trust dated as of May 30, 2024. The Trust currently offers a single series, the Franklin Ethereum ETF (the Fund). The Fund issues common units of beneficial interest (Shares), which represent units of fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Fund. The ...
